papers.title: Discovery of Danuglipron (PF-06882961): First Oral Small Molecule GLP-1 Receptor Agonist

discontinuation.details: One trial patient experienced potential drug-induced liver injury that resolved after discontinuation. Pfizer decided to discontinue ALL development (both BID and QD formulations).

notes: ❌ DISCONTINUED (April 14, 2025) - First major oral GLP-1 discontinuation due to liver safety concerns. Important case study for oral GLP-1 development risks. Both immediate-release (BID) and extended-release (QD) formulations discontinued.
